name: Chicken and Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 can Swanson Ready to Serve Clear Chicken (14 1/2 oz) -- broth
1/2 teaspoon ground ginger, or 1 tsp grated fresh ginger
2 medium carrots, cut into matchstick-thin strips (about 1 cup)
1 small zucchini, diagonally sliced (about 1 cup) or 1 cup fresh broccoli florets
2 cans Swanson Premium Chunk White Chicken, drained (5 oz each)
1 medium green onion, diagonally sliced (about 2 tbsp), optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together cornstarch, chicken broth, soy sauce, and ginger until smooth; set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a 10-inch skillet or wok over medium heat.
3. Stir-fry carrots, zucchini, and mushrooms until tender-crisp.
4. Add the reserved cornstarch mixture to the pan. Cook until the mixture boils and thickens, stirring constantly.
5. Gently stir in the chicken; heat through, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve over rice. Sprinkle with onion if desired. Makes 3 1/2 cups.
